## Checklist

- [ ] `lake build`, `bash scripts/check.sh`, and `git diff --check` pass locally
- [ ] New declarations have adversarial examples in the file's tests section
- [ ] Public antecedents are cited in docstrings (and `PROVENANCE.md` if they materially inform a proof)
- [ ] No `sorry`, no custom axioms, no statement changes to existing API without discussion
- [ ] I agree my contribution is licensed under Apache-2.0 (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
